examples: The Study of Potassium Phenoxide-1, 3, 5-trinitrobenzene Charge Transfer Complexes.
METHODS The rat colitis model was induced by acetic acid or 2, 4, 6-trinitrobenzene sulfonic acid (TNBS) enema.
Objective:To investigate the roles of pentoxifylline(PTX) on the murine 2,4,6 trinitrobenzene sulfonic acid (TNBS) colitis model.
